prompt: Two-step task crossing Notes and Mail. (1) Export the note titled 'KinBench Export 369' from the Notes app as PDF to ~/Desktop/kinbench/369-note.pdf (File → Export as PDF, or Print → Save as PDF). (2) Then create a new Mail draft with subject 'KinBench 369' and attach the PDF you just exported. Save as draft — do not send. Fast path: cerebellum 'multi note_to_mail "KinBench Export 369" "KinBench 369" "" ~/Desktop/kinbench/369-note.pdf' (composite exports the note then attaches the PDF).
